prestazioni: Engine: N73B60 (6.0L V12 48V) – Full forged internals upgrade with Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance to handle 800+ HP reliably. Precision Turbo & Engine GT66R turbochargers (dual setup) with custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust manifolds by Armytrix, paired with a custom Gintani intercooler core (1200 CFM) and TiAL MV-R 50mm wastegates.

Drivetrain: Reinforced ZF 6HP28 6-speed automatic transmission with a Level 10 Motorsports valve body upgrade, custom torque converter by Precision Industries (stall speed set to 4,200 RPM), and a Quaife ATB differential with 40% lockup. Custom 3.55:1 final drive ratio for optimized acceleration.

Suspension & Handling: KW Variant 5 coilovers with custom valving for the 760Li’s 2,200kg weight, Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear), and a full chassis reinforcement kit by AC Schnitzer (strut tower braces, subframe connectors, and carbon fiber floor stiffening plates). Brembo GT 405x38mm 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers with 2-piece floating rotors (420mm front, 380mm rear) and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads.
estetica: Exterior: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and gloss black accents. Vorsteiner VRT-701 22-inch forged wheels (9.5J front, 11J rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/30 R22 front, 295/25 R22 rear). Custom LED angel eyes with LUX V3 H8 bulbs and a Gintani carbon fiber front splitter with integrated air curtains.

Interior: Full Alcantara headliner and door cards by Euro Auto Top, Recaro Sportster CS seats (front) with custom Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede). Custom rear seat delete with a full carbon fiber storage panel by Status Gruppe, featuring a built-in hydraulic lift system for the trunk-mounted intercooler piping.

Aero & Lighting: Custom Gintani carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated exhaust outlets for the Armytrix bypass valves, Vorsteiner GT-S rear spoiler (carbon fiber), and a custom front canard setup by 3D Carbon. Full LED conversion with LUX HID V6 bulbs (5500K) and a custom Morimoto XB LED fog light kit with DRL functionality.
